LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF ENVIROMENTAL HEALTH ADVOCATES, INC. DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT. ENVIRONMENTAL HEALTH ADVOCATES, INC.'S DEMURRER IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR FOR NONCOMPLIANCE WITH CCP 430.41, WHICH REQUIRES THAT THE PARTIES CONDUCT A "MEET AND CONFER IN PERSON OR BY TELEPHONE" BEFORE A DEMURRER IS FILED. DEMURRER to ANSWER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-25-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ENVIROMENTAL HEALTH ADVOCATES, INC. DEMURRER to ANSWER to COMPLAINT. Environmental Health Advocates, Inc.'s demurrer is ordered off calendar for noncompliance with CCP 430.41, which requires that the parties conduct a "meet and confer in person or by telephone" before a demurrer is filed. Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-28-2023 Continued To Oct-11-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
